summary: Sprint 2 testing completed successfully. Fixed backend route ordering issue for /api/appointments/filtered. All 16 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend UI testing confirms all Sprint 2 features working: filters, notifications panel, search functionality.

fixed_by_tester.issue: Route returned 404 because 'filtered' was being matched as apt_id parameter
fixed_by_tester.fix: Moved /appointments/filtered route BEFORE /appointments/{apt_id} route in server.py

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/appointments/filtered - 200 OK
Backend: Filter by status=confirmado works
Backend: Filter by date range works
Backend: Search by name/protocol works
Backend: Combined filters work
Backend: GET /api/notifications - 200 OK
Backend: GET /api/notifications?read=false works
Backend: PUT /api/notifications/read-all - 200 OK
Backend: DELETE /api/notifications/{id} - 200 OK
Backend: DELETE /api/notifications (read) - 200 OK
Backend: GET /api/stats/dashboard - 200 OK with correct structure
Backend: Dashboard stats with date param works
Backend: Dashboard stats restricted for non-supervisor (403)
Backend: Auto-assign field tracked in stats
Backend: GET /api/users/attendants - 200 OK
Backend: Auto-assign background task running (confirmed in logs)
Frontend: Filters button visible for supervisor
Frontend: Filters panel expands on click
Frontend: Search by name/protocol works - returns results
Frontend: Status filter dropdown works
Frontend: Agent filter dropdown visible for supervisor
Frontend: Date range filters work
Frontend: Notifications bell visible with counter
Frontend: Notifications panel opens on click
Frontend: Mark notification as read works
Frontend: Delete notification works
Frontend: Mark all as read button works
Frontend: Limpar lidas (delete read) button works
critical_code_review_comments: Route ordering in FastAPI: Static routes like /filtered must be defined BEFORE parameterized routes like /{apt_id}
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_AutoAssign appointment for testing pending appointments (cleaned up by assigning)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint 2 features all working. Route ordering fix was critical - /appointments/filtered must come before /appointments/{apt_id}. Auto-assign background task is running every 60 seconds. Test data with 'TEST_' prefix exists in DB.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: FastAPI route ordering - /appointments/{apt_id} was defined before /appointments/filtered, so 'filtered' was being matched as an apt_id parameter
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Moved the /appointments/filtered route definition to appear before /appointments/{apt_id} in server.py
rca_of_the_issue.verification: All 16 backend tests pass, frontend filter search works correctly
